name: 兄弟鬩牆（被操控的競爭）
description: Tristan和Josh的對立並非天生仇恨，而是父親的偏心與操控導致，兩人最終都成為父權遊戲的受害者，帶有悲劇色彩。

examples.drama_title: love drama "I was tricked into marrying a blind CEO I didn't know" HD FULL, CEO,ENGSUB,  Episodes
examples.excerpt: I was just a tool to sharpen Tristan. You used me to train him. You still refuse to admit your mistakes. / I let you compete. You were never supposed to hurt each other.
examples.context: Tristan和Josh的對立並非天生仇恨，而是父親的偏心與操控導致，兩人最終都成為父權遊戲的受害者，帶有悲劇色彩。
